field.value: This figure, elegantly draped, evokes Greek models. The drapery that clings to the body and slips on the right shoulder is typical of an image of Aphrodite. This statue, a very fashionable one in the Roman world, was also used for portraits of persons of imperial rank. The open gesture of the restored arm, stretched almost to the point of holding up, or indicating, some product of the earth, contributed in the modern period to the identification of the piece as Demeter.
